decisions.briefing: Markets are neutral-to-slightly-down today with NASDAQ -0.7% and S&P500 -0.2%, giving no risk-on signal to justify deploying the remaining $577 in cash. Per the established cadence — save dry powder through neutral days, deploy on the first genuine risk-on session — holding is the correct call. All six existing positions remain above their stop-loss levels and are held.

market_education.summary_en: Stocks drifted lower to start Q3 2026 as investors rotated cautiously after a strong June rally, with the NASDAQ underperforming amid profit-taking in momentum names. Quarter-end window-dressing flows from the prior session reversed, leaving no clear catalyst to sustain buying. The mild selloff reflects position consolidation rather than a fundamental shift, with market participants waiting for upcoming economic data to set direction.
market_education.summary_zh: 踏入2026年第三季首個交易日，市場在六月強勁上漲後出現審慎輪動，投資者趁機對強勢股獲利回吐，科技為主的納指表現相對落後。季末「窗飾效應」帶來的資金流入已於前一交易日消退，市場缺乏明確催化劑支撐買盤。整體而言，此次溫和回調屬技術性整固，投資者正靜待新一批經濟數據以確認後市方向。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Dry powder refers to cash or liquid assets held in reserve, ready to be deployed when the right opportunity arises. Investors deliberately keep some cash on the sidelines during uncertain or neutral market days so they can act decisively when a strong signal appears — like a NASDAQ +2% risk-on session. Spending all your cash on a flat day means missing the better entry just around the corner.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「乾火藥」（Dry Powder）是指投資者保留在手的現金或高流動性資產，等待最佳時機再行出擊。在市場方向不明朗的中性日子，刻意保留部分現金，一旦出現明確的風險偏好訊號——例如納指單日上漲逾2%——便能快速果斷部署資金。若在行情平淡時倉促入市，往往錯失隨後更佳的建倉機會。
